seoTitle: Anembo vs Angledale — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Anembo and Angledale. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Anembo and Angledale.
heading: Anembo vs Angledale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Anembo, New South Wales and Angledale, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Anembo and Angledale have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Anembo or Angledale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Anembo has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Angledale scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Anembo scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Angledale scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Anembo or Angledale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Anembo has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
